sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content: In compliance with Article 22.2 of Spanish Law 34/2002 (LSSI-CE), Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD) cookie guidelines, we inform you about the cookies and similar technologies (localStorage and sessionStorage) used by www.grupoenjoy.es.

sections.heading: 1. What are cookies?
sections.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. Alongside them, similar technologies such as browser local storage (localStorage and sessionStorage) serve comparable purposes. They allow the website to recognise you, remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience. They can be first-party (set by our domain) or third-party (set by other domains).

sections.heading: 2. Cookies and storage we use
sections.content:
2.1. Strictly necessary

Essential for the website to work. They do not require consent (Art. 22.2 LSSI-CE) and cannot be disabled.

NameTypeProviderPurposeDuration
ge_cookie_consentlocalStoragegrupoenjoy.esStores your cookie decision (accept, reject or custom settings), with date and policy versionUntil deleted; we will ask again after 12 months
ge_localeFirst-party cookiegrupoenjoy.esRemembers your chosen language (Spanish, English, German, French or Italian)12 months
ge_age_verifiedsessionStoragegrupoenjoy.esAge confirmation to access the Outxide Club sectionSession (deleted when the browser closes)
ge_admin_sessionFirst-party cookiegrupoenjoy.esInternal admin panel session (authorised staff only; never set for visitors)24 hours

2.2. Analytics

They let us measure and analyse website traffic in aggregate. They are only set after your explicit consent through the cookie banner.

NameTypeProviderPurposeDuration
_gaThird-party cookieGoogle Analytics 4 (Google Ireland Ltd.)Distinguishes unique users via a random identifier13 months
_ga_*Third-party cookieGoogle Analytics 4 (Google Ireland Ltd.)Maintains session state13 months

2.3. Marketing

Used to measure advertising campaign performance and show relevant ads. Only set after your explicit consent.

NameTypeProviderPurposeDuration
_fbpThird-party cookieMeta Platforms Ireland Ltd. (Facebook/Instagram)Conversion measurement and remarketing3 months
_fbcThird-party cookieMeta Platforms Ireland Ltd.Attribution of ad clicks3 months
_ttpThird-party cookieTikTok Technology Ltd.Conversion measurement and remarketing13 months

2.4. On-demand third parties (location map)

On the contact page, the Google Maps embed does not load automatically: only if you press the “Load map” button. When you do, Google may set its own cookies:

NameTypeProviderPurposeDuration
NID, AEC, SOCSThird-party cookiesGoogle Ireland Ltd. (Google Maps)Map display and Google preferencesUp to 6 months

2.5. Linked external services

Outxide Club tickets are purchased on the external platform FourVenues (web.fourvenues.com) and Hiru reservations on Restoo. When you follow those links you leave our website and the cookie and privacy policies of those platforms apply; we recommend reviewing them.

sections.heading: 3. International transfers
sections.content:
The providers of analytics and marketing cookies (Google, Meta and TikTok) may transfer data to their parent companies in the United States. These transfers are covered by the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework, under which Google LLC and Meta Platforms, Inc. are certified, and/or by the Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission. Details are available in each provider's privacy policy:

  • Google
  • Meta
  • TikTok

sections.heading: 4. Consent and Consent Mode v2
sections.content:
We manage your consent through our own banner. Your decision is stored in your browser's local storage (ge_cookie_consent) together with the date and the version of this policy, and is valid for a maximum of 12 months, after which we will ask for your consent again.

We also use Google Consent Mode v2. By default, all consent parameters are set to denied:

  • analytics_storage: denied
  • ad_storage: denied
  • ad_user_data: denied
  • ad_personalization: denied

The Google Analytics 4, Meta Pixel and TikTok Pixel scripts are not loaded until you give the corresponding consent. Until then, no analytics or marketing cookie is set and no browsing data is collected.

sections.heading: 5. Managing and withdrawing consent
sections.content:
You can change or withdraw your consent at any time, as easily as you gave it, through the “Cookie settings” link in the footer. When you withdraw consent, we delete from your browser the analytics and marketing cookies set from our domain (_ga, _ga_*, _fbp, _fbc, _ttp). Please note that third parties may retain data already collected; to exercise your rights with them, see their privacy policies (links in section 3).

You can also configure your browser to reject or delete cookies:

  • Google Chrome
  • Mozilla Firefox
  • Safari
  • Microsoft Edge

sections.heading: 6. Updates
sections.content: We may update this Cookie Policy to reflect changes in the cookies we use or for legal reasons. The date of the last revision appears in the header. If the change is substantial, the banner will ask for your consent again.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
sections.content: For any query related to the use of cookies or to exercise your rights, you can write to privacidad@grupoenjoy.es. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD).
